data.title: Head of Operations
data.raw_snippet: The Head of Operations determines the long\-term strategic goals of Nextcare Operations. The incumbent will be responsible to ensure operational excellence through strategizing, monitoring, and planning the functioning of all divisions within Operations in the Gulf Region (UAE, Oman, Kuwait, Bahrain
data.jd_text:
The Head of Operations determines the long\-term strategic goals of Nextcare Operations. The incumbent will be responsible to ensure operational excellence through strategizing, monitoring, and planning the functioning of all divisions within Operations in the Gulf Region (UAE, Oman, Kuwait, Bahrain and Qatar). This will be done through proactive initiatives to optimize efficiency and customer satisfaction.
   

  

 This role has an overall responsibility to plan, direct, and manage the operations in the following departments: Pre\-Certification (Out Patient), Medical Claims (In Patient), Claims Management, After Sales Support, and Care Centre.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
**Strategy formulation and implementation**
* Contribute to the development and refinement of Nextcare vision and strategy
* Support the overall process of management and corporate decision\-making to ensure the organization maximizes its short, medium and long\-term profitability and returns to its shareholders
* Liaise with other executive heads on the implementation of the company’s strategic and operational plans
* Develop, review, and report on the operations division’s strategy, ensuring the strategic objectives are well understood and executed by the heads of department
* Project Management – plan, organize, and manage resources to bring about the successful completion of specific project goals and objectives.
* Deliver all aspects of Departmental Management including: Quality Hires and Training needs / Personal Development / Performance Monitoring / Team Building.


**Management of the overall Operations function**
* Provide strategic leadership to build Operations , develop Standard Operating Procedures , and ensure ongoing process improvements.
* Ensure that the operations functions of the company are run effectively and efficiently so that each operational division performs in terms with their strategic plan, developmental plan and operational plan objectives
* Develop, iterate, document, and execute strategies taking into account uncertainties, key decisions, potential outcomes, and estimated associated costs.
* Identify issues and trends advice corrective action with regards to Operations process; provides guidance and sets policies for all functions within Operations.
* Maintain the administration, budgeting, monitoring, reporting, communication and liaison on all company affairs at a level acceptable to the management
* Implement, maintain and manage an effective system of controls throughout the company, covering non\-financial as well as financial controls
* Ensure that operating objectives and standards of performance are well defined and implemented across the function.
* Ensure that appropriate standards of conduct are established and complied with.
* Present a yearly budget for COO approval and prudently manage resources within those budget guidelines according to company policy and within ethical corporate governance guidelines
* Management, monitoring, reporting and communication in regard to financial and physical resources, administration and budgeting of operations
* Maintain and develop organizational culture, values and reputation in its markets and with all staff, customers, partners and official bodies.


**People Management**
* Build and lead an effective and cohesive management team
* In consultation with HR implement effective succession planning, people
* Management, development, recruitment, and retention strategies for the division
* Manage the performance of all heads of department within the division
* Ensure proper execution of performance management system
* Promotion of employment equity and transformation


**What You Will Bring**
* Bachelors in a relevant discipline; Medical qualification is an advantage
* Minimum 7 years relevant experience in a senior role in the TPA/Assistance Operations
* Strong business and operational acumen
* Excellent communication skills , both written and verbal
* Fluency in MS Office (Excel, Word, Outlook, PowerPoint) and general internet navigation and research skills
* Legally permitted to work in the country of operations.


**What We Offer**
 Our employees play an integral part in our success as a business. We appreciate that each of our employees are unique and have unique needs, ambitions and we enjoy being a part of their journey. We are there to empower and encourage you with your personal and professional development ensuring that you take control by offering a large variety of courses and targeted development programs. All that in a global environment where international mobility and career progression are encouraged. Caring for your health and wellbeing is key priority for us. This is why we build Work Well programs to providing you with peace of mind and give the flexibility in planning and arranging for a better work\-life balance.
   

  

 89721 \| Operations \| Professional \| Allianz Executive \| Allianz Partners \| Full\-Time \| Permanent
   

  

 Allianz Group is one of the most trusted insurance and asset management companies in the world. Caring for our employees, their ambitions, dreams and challenges, is what makes us a unique employer. Together we can build an environment where everyone feels empowered and has the confidence to explore, to grow and to shape a better future for our customers and the world around us.
   

  

 At Allianz, we stand for unity: we believe that a united world is a more prosperous world, and we are dedicated to consistently advocating for equal opportunities for all. And the foundation for this is our inclusive workplace, where people and performance both matter, and nurtures a culture grounded in integrity, fairness, inclusion and trust.
   

  

 We therefore welcome applications regardless of ethnicity or cultural background, age, gender, nationality, religion, social class, disability or sexual orientation, or any other characteristics protected under applicable local laws and regulations.
   

  

**Join us.** 
 Let's care for tomorrow.
   

  

 Note: Having different strengths, experiences, perspectives and approaches is an integral part of Allianz‘ company culture. One means to achieve this is a regular rotation of Allianz Executive employees across functions, Allianz entities and geographies. Therefore, the company expects from its employees a general openness and a high motivation to regularly change positions and collect experiences across Allianz Group.

**Position Title:** 
 BD \& Growth, Air Force w/ TS/SCI (Director\-Level)
   

  

**Departmental Function(s):** 
 Growth Leader (BD Executive), Senior Program Manager
   

  

**Location:** 
 Remote – with expectation to Travel to Wright\-Patterson AFB in Dayton, OH and other Customer Site(s)
 **as needed.**
**Clearance:** 
 DOD/DOW TS/SCI
   

  

**Company Overview**
 ASI Government provides government leaders with the expertise they need to navigate acquisition and organizational challenges so they can make an impact and achieve their goals. For over
 **30 years** 
 , ASI has transformed the way government does business, impacting over 70 government agencies across the civilian, defense, and intelligence communities.
   

  

 Do you thrive on creating unique and impactful value for Federal clients? Are you passionate about partnering with clients and collaborating to create solutions? Do you enjoy the opportunity to drive change that impacts our nation? We are looking for smart, curious, driven individuals to join us in partnering with our client to help them solve some of the nation’s most challenging problems. ASI Government serves as a trusted adviser to government leaders seeking improved performance, enhanced organization effectiveness, and strategic change.
   

  

**Job Description**
 We are seeking a battle‑tested Air Force Executive Leader to
 **own, grow, and scale** 
 our Air Force portfolio. This role is designed for a senior professional with deep Air Force experience, trusted relationships across the Air Force ecosystem, and a proven ability to turn access into growth.
   

  

 This leader will sit at the intersection of
 **strategy** 
 ,
 **mission delivery** 
 , and
 **business expansion / development** 
 serving as:
   

  

* Director of Air Force portfolio growth
* Business Development / Growth Leadership


 This is a high‑impact, high‑visibility leadership role with direct influence on company growth, client trust, and mission outcomes. This is not a caretaker position. This is a
 **build\-and\-lead role** 
 for someone who wants to
 **shape strategy, drive growth, and leave a lasting impact on Air Force mission success** 
 . You will have executive visibility, real authority, and the opportunity to scale a portfolio with momentum.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
**Air Force Portfolio Leadership \& Growth**
* Own the overall strategy, growth plan, and execution of the Air Force portfolio.
* Ability to be the BD / Account Executive for the Air Force Portfolio with your vast Air Force Network; leaning on your previous connections and leadership experience from past engagements.
* Leverage established Air Force relationships (uniformed, civilian, and industry) to expand footprint, influence, and revenue.
* Serve as a trusted executive partner to Air Force clients, anticipating needs and positioning the company ahead of demand.
* Identify, shape, and support new business opportunities, including capture strategy, client engagement, and solution framing.
* Represent the company with credibility and authority across Navy commands and partner organizations.


**Program Management \& Delivery**
* Serve as Portfolio/Program Manager for the Air Force initiatives.
* Ensure excellence across performance, schedule, budget, and mission delivery.
* Lead teams supporting logistics modernization, readiness analytics, sustainment innovation, and UAS capability integration.
* Ensure outcomes directly support Air Force mission priorities.


**Required**
* Current and Active DOD/DOW TS/SCI. “SCI eligibility” required
* Prior Air Force, Space Force, Aerospace experience \- uniformed or civilian \- with strong understanding of Air Force operations, culture, decision\-making, and mission execution..
* Strong, current Air Force relationships with the credibility to operate at senior officers and executives.
* Prior experience as a Business Development or Account Executive within the Air Force community.
+ Foundational to Expert knowledge of the Air Force Acquisition and Procurement process both traditional (FAR based) and non\-traditional (OT / OTA’s) mechanisms.

* Ability to gain trust immediately with your knowledge and reputation gained throughout your civilian and/or military career as trusted leader.
* Proven success managing complex Air Force programs or major logistics initiatives.
* Demonstrated experience in strategy development or logistics transformation.
* Ability to lead teams, influence stakeholders, and engage effectively at senior Air Force levels.
* Willingness to travel to Air Force sites as required.


**Preferred**
* Former senior Air Force officer or Senior Air Force civilian (Growth Focused).
* Directly supported the Air Force Life Cycle Management Center (AFLCMC) with a deep network of trusted leaders.
* Experience leading industrial base modernization initiatives.
* Balanced strength as strategist and operator.


**Work Location \& Schedule**
* Primary Location: Remote; Dayton, OH preferred
* Onsite Requirements: Travel to Wright\-Patterson AFB \& Air Force locations when needed
* Start Date: ASAP


**Why Join ASI Government?**
* Work on high\-impact, high\-visibility projects that improve government services.
* Collaborate with experienced consultants in strategy, analytics, and organizational development.
* Opportunity for career growth in a dynamic and mission\-driven environment.
* Competitive compensation and comprehensive benefits package ( viewable on our careers site).

All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity, age, status as a protected veteran, or status as a qualified individual with a disability. If, because of a medical condition or disability, you need a reasonable accommodation for any part of the application process, please send an email at hr@asigovt.com or call 703\-253\-6300 and let us know the nature of your request.

We have been retained by a leading global crypto exchange undergoing rapid evolution into a multi\-product financial platform spanning trading, payments, wealth, and institutional solutions.

* Scale market expansion leveraging local regulatory and commercial dynamics
* Optimise performance across a diversified product suite (trading, payments, wealth, institutional)
* Establish KPI frameworks and embed data\-driven decision making
* Partner cross\-functionally (Product, Tech, Compliance) to enable scalable growth

* Drive operational excellence across all markets

* Senior executive with proven global P\&L ownership
* Track record scaling high\-growth, complex businesses across multiple markets
* Strong understanding of international regulatory and commercial landscapes
* Experience in crypto, fintech, or adjacent digital sectors preferred
* Strategic and hands\-on operator with a strong commercial mindset
* Data\-led decision maker with high execution intensity
* Able to influence senior stakeholders across regions and functions
* Fluent English required; Mandarin advantageous

data.raw_snippet:

* **Value Creation** 
 : Strategically investing to maximize the potential of our acquired brands.
data.jd_text:
Ecomma is a rapidly growing private equity firm with proven expertise in acquiring ecommerce brands worldwide. We excel in a range of areas that drive genuine results and online growth, including:
 


* **Value Creation** 
 : Strategically investing to maximize the potential of our acquired brands.
* **Operational Excellence** 
 : Leveraging best practices and a seasoned team to optimize brand operations.
* **Sustainable Growth** 
 : Prioritizing long\-term success with sustainable practices.
* **Data\-driven Marketing Strategies** 
 : Using data to tailor marketing campaigns for optimal reach and conversion.



  





 We asked our current team members to tell us what they love about working at Ecomma, and here's what they shared:
 


* Supporting
 **top\-tier brands** 
 that truly make a difference in the world.
* Knowing the impact of our
 **expertise** 
 (check out our success stories).
* Connecting with
 **C\-level executives** 
 and leading e\-commerce businesses.
* Working in the world's most progressive industry at a firm that prioritizes
 **personal development.**
* Enjoying a
 **great atmosphere** 
 with fun team outings.
* Having the opportunity for
 **substantial compensation, including lucrative bonuses.**
* As
 **Head of Agency \| Marketing Director \| Customer Success** 
 , you will be the driving force behind the operational performance of Ecomma's active portfolio businesses and post\-sale agency accounts. Your mission is simple: build and run a tight operating system that stabilises businesses quickly, drives revenue and EBITDA improvement, makes portfolio businesses exit\-ready, and ensures the engine behind both Portfolio and Agency runs with discipline, speed, and accountability.



  





 This is a highly commercial and turnaround\-focused role. You will take ownership of portfolio business performance, agency operations oversight, transition and handover discipline, EBITDA improvement, and Build Your Own project coordination, with the clear goal of turning around the businesses we manage and making them commercially stronger, more stable, and less founder\-dependent. You will work closely with our COO, CEO and leadership team to ensure operations directly support commercial outcomes, retention, and exit readiness. We are looking for a Head of Agency \| Marketing Director \| Customer Success with a strong operator background in e\-commerce, portfolio management, or multi\-brand business operations. Someone who understands revenue, margin, and EBITDA, how to identify where a business is leaking, how to move fast, and how to use AI tools and workflows to run a lean and highly effective operating department. Are you the next Head of Agency ready to scale Ecomma to the next level?
 



  





 What you will do
 



  




* **Own Portfolio Business Performance** 
 : Take full ownership of the weekly operating rhythm across all active portfolio businesses. Track revenue, gross margin, and EBITDA by business, identify underperforming brands early, and drive recovery plans that push businesses toward stronger commercial performance and exit readiness.
* **Drive Agency Operations Oversight** 
 : Oversee the operating side of agency\-managed businesses after handover. Ensure clear alignment between what has been promised and what is realistically deliverable, with tight coordination between CSM, performance, ops, and technical support. Improve account stability, issue resolution speed, and internal accountability to support retention.
* **Own Transition and Handover Discipline:** 
 Own and enforce seller\-to\-portfolio and portfolio\-to\-agency handover standards. Ensure all required inputs, documents, and business context are transferred properly, flag incomplete handovers early, and reduce loss of momentum during change of ownership and internal transition.
* **Drive EBITDA and Self\-Sustainability:** 
 Push portfolio businesses toward stronger EBITDA performance. Improve visibility into what is driving profitability or dragging it down, support working capital awareness and operational cost discipline, and help the division move toward being financially healthier and less dependent on founder intervention.
* **Oversee Build Your Own Projects:** 
 Lead the operational coordination of active BYO projects once live. Ensure structured follow\-through across launch, setup, and performance phases, and coordinate with relevant teams to keep projects moving and commercially on track.
* **Solve Cross\-Functional Operating Issues:** 
 Work with internal teams to resolve supplier, logistics, customer service, marketing, and website issues affecting portfolio performance. Be the person who unblocks things quickly so senior leadership does not need to jump in constantly.
* **Make Portfolio Businesses Exit\-Ready:** 
 Drive brands toward stronger commercial performance, operational stability, and sellability so portfolio numbers become visible, reliable, and improving.
* **Build a High\-Performance Operating Team:** 
 Set a clear weekly cadence for priorities, blockers, follow\-ups, and accountability. Ensure team members know what they own and by when, push for strong follow\-through rather than just updates, and escalate issues early rather than allowing drift.
* **Implement AI\-First Workflows:** 
 Bring an AI\-first mindset to the operating department by using AI tools, automations, and systems to improve speed, output, reporting, and team efficiency across portfolio and agency.
* **Track Performance Relentlessly:** 
 Set clear KPIs and reporting structures across portfolio and agency, including portfolio revenue growth, EBITDA, number of exit\-ready businesses, time to stabilise post\-handover, red/at\-risk brand count, recovery rate on underperforming brands, handover completion quality, and operational SLA follow\-through. You understand that operations exist to generate measurable business outcomes, not activity reports.
* **Improve Stability and Accountability:** 
 Continuously refine operating rhythm, escalation paths, and cross\-functional discipline so agency ops become less reactive and more structured, and businesses stop drifting after handover.
* **Create a Scalable Operating Engine:** 
 Build an operating function that is structured, repeatable, lean, and able to scale alongside the company as we continue to grow.



  





 We operate using Google Workspace, Slack, and Notion. Thus, familiarity and hands\-on experience with these platforms are important for this role. The candidate should be fluent in English, with excellent interpersonal, verbal, and written communication skills. A strong commercial instinct, analytical thinking, fast execution, and high ownership are essential. Tools in use may include portfolio performance trackers, P\&L and EBITDA reporting dashboards, handover and documentation systems, project and task management platforms, client/account management tools, and AI platforms that improve output, speed, and operating efficiency.
 



  





 What you bring to the table:
 


* 5\+ years of experience in e\-commerce operations, portfolio management, multi\-brand business operations, or agency operations leadership, ideally in a high\-growth, roll\-up, or aggregator environment.
* Proven experience stabilising, turning around, and driving commercial improvement across multiple businesses at the same time.
* A strong background in operations and commercial performance, with clear evidence that you know how to move businesses from underperforming to exit\-ready.
* Experience leading and coordinating cross\-functional teams, including CSM, performance, ops, finance, and client/account contributors.
* A highly commercial mindset. You understand revenue, gross margin, and EBITDA, not just task execution, and you know how operations should directly support commercial outcomes.
* Experience working in e\-commerce operations, roll\-up/aggregator/multi\-brand portfolios, agency operations, or GM/multi\-store environments is a strong plus.
* Strong analytical skills and confidence with P\&L, reporting, attribution, and decision\-making based on data.
* An AI\-first mindset. You actively use AI tools, workflows, and automations to improve operating output, team efficiency, and speed of execution.
* Excellent organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple businesses, handovers, and priorities at the same time.
* Strong follow\-through, escalation, and cross\-functional coordination skills. Able to work with performance, ops, finance, and client/account teams without getting lost in the noise.
* A hands\-on mentality. You are strategic, but you are also willing to dig into the detail, fix issues directly, and drive accountability when needed.
* Calm under pressure, but not soft on accountability. High standards, strong ownership, and the ability to build a culture of urgency and operational clarity.
* Fluent in English with strong verbal and written communication skills.
* High ethical standards and a commitment to conducting business with integrity.



  





 The position will be filled immediately for the right candidate.
 



  





 Working at Ecomma is more than just a job. If you believe in seizing the present to enhance your future, you're in the right place. Combining hard work with the right atmosphere is our golden formula. We don't operate with a 9\-6 mindset, allowing you to manage your own working hours. We've found this approach yields the best results. Ecomma: a private equity firm you can count on.
 



  





 Please note: Proficiency in English is required.
 



  





 Does this opportunity excite you? Are you eager to dive in and unleash your creative finance mind? If you want to be a part of the Ecomma team, send your motivation letter and CV addressed to the respective job title application.
 



  





*If this role isn't a fit for you but you know someone it might suit, please share it with them \- we'd greatly appreciate it!*

data.title: Regional Head of Security Operations Center (SOC)
data.raw_snippet: The Regional Head of Security Operations Center (SOC) leads and transforms multi\-country SOC operations across the UAE, KSA, Kuwait, and Jordan, ensuring scalable and efficient delivery of MSS and MDR services. This role is responsible for defining SOC strategy, driving automation and AI\-led trans
data.jd_text:
The Regional Head of Security Operations Center (SOC) leads and transforms multi\-country SOC operations across the UAE, KSA, Kuwait, and Jordan, ensuring scalable and efficient delivery of MSS and MDR services. This role is responsible for defining SOC strategy, driving automation and AI\-led transformation, and aligning operations with global frameworks such as NIST and MITRE ATT\&CK. The position oversees end\-to\-end SOC service delivery, including technology platforms like SIEM, SOAR, and XDR, while ensuring standardization, profitability, and high service quality.
 



  





 It also involves managing regional teams, optimizing processes, and maintaining strong governance and compliance across all locations. Acting as a key customer interface, the role ensures stakeholder satisfaction, leads incident escalation, and supports business growth through collaboration with sales and product teams. Additionally, the role focuses on performance management, workforce development, and continuous improvement of detection, response, and automation capabilities.
 



  





 Responsibilities:
 




 Strategic Leadership \& SOC Transformation
 



* Define and execute the regional SOC strategy aligned with MSS/MDR business objectives
* Drive transformation initiatives focused on automation, AI\-driven operations, and scalable service delivery
* Establish and enhance SOC maturity using frameworks such as NIST and SOC\-CMM
* Lead innovation in detection, response, and operational efficiency



  






 Regional SOC Operations Management
 



* Oversee SOC operations across UAE, KSA, Kuwait, and Jordan
* Design and implement centralized and hybrid SOC operating models
* Ensure consistent service delivery, governance, and regulatory compliance across regions
* Manage central and regional SOC teams, ensuring operational alignment



  






 MSS / MDR Service Ownership
 



* Own end\-to\-end delivery of Managed Security Services (MSS) and Managed Detection \& Response (MDR)
* Define and optimize service catalogues, SLAs, and pricing strategies
* Ensure scalability, standardization, and profitability of SOC services
* Maintain high service quality and customer satisfaction



  






 Technology \& Platform Leadership
 



* Own and manage SOC technology stack including SIEM, SOAR, XDR, TIP, NDR, DRP, and ASM platforms
* Drive platform consolidation and multi\-tenant architecture strategy
* Lead automation initiatives to reduce manual effort and improve efficiency
* Ensure optimal utilization and ROI of cybersecurity tools



  






 Detection Engineering \& Advanced SOC Capabilities
 



* Lead development and tuning of detection use cases aligned to MITRE ATT\&CK
* Oversee SIEM content lifecycle and correlation rule optimization
* Drive threat detection improvements using behavioral analytics and UEBA
* Enable proactive threat hunting and reduce false positives



  






 AI \& Automation Enablement
 



* Drive AI/ML adoption for threat detection, anomaly identification, and response optimization
* Automate L1/L2 SOC activities through SOAR and orchestration platforms
* Continuously improve detection accuracy, response speed, and operational efficiency



  






 Vulnerability Management \& Threat Intelligence
 



* Oversee vulnerability management including scanning, prioritization, and remediation tracking
* Deliver risk\-based reporting and ensure compliance alignment
* Integrate threat intelligence feeds and OSINT into SOC workflows
* Monitor external threats, digital risks, and support proactive defense strategies



  






 Customer \& Stakeholder Engagement
 



* Act as executive point of contact for key SOC customers
* Lead QBRs, service reviews, and incident escalation (including P1 incidents)
* Communicate risks, gaps, and improvement plans effectively
* Ensure high levels of customer satisfaction and trust



  






 Governance, Process \& Continuous Improvement
 



* Define and maintain SOC processes, playbooks, and runbooks
* Ensure adherence to global standards and regulatory requirements (e.g., NCA, data residency)
* Drive continuous improvement across detection, response, and operations
* Establish strong governance and reporting mechanisms



  






 Commercial \& Business Collaboration
 



* Collaborate with Sales, Presales, and Product teams to support business growth
* Contribute to RFPs, proposals, and SOC solution design
* Support pricing strategies and market positioning of MSS services
* Align SOC capabilities with business and revenue objectives



  






 Performance Management \& Reporting
 



* Define and track SOC KPIs such as MTTD, MTTR, SLA compliance, and analyst productivity
* Monitor detection coverage and automation rates
* Provide regular performance reports to senior leadership
* Drive data\-driven decision\-making and accountability



  






 Talent \& Workforce Strategy
 



* Build and lead high\-performing SOC teams across regions
* Drive workforce planning aligned with growth and nationalization requirements
* Lead training, upskilling, and career development programs
* Optimize team structure to improve efficiency and reduce attrition



  





**Requirements** 



* 12\+ years of experience in cybersecurity with at least 7\+ years in SOC/MDR leadership roles, preferably within an MSSP environment
* Proven experience managing large\-scale, multi\-country SOC operations and delivering MSS/MDR services
* Strong expertise in SOC technologies including SIEM, SOAR, XDR, Threat Intelligence, and automation platforms
* Deep understanding of cybersecurity frameworks such as NIST, ISO 27001, and MITRE ATT\&CK, along with SOC maturity models
* Experience in driving SOC transformation initiatives including automation, AI/ML adoption, and multi\-tenant architecture
* Strong leadership skills with experience in building, managing, and scaling high\-performing teams across regions
* Excellent customer\-facing and stakeholder management skills, including handling escalations and executive communication
* Good commercial acumen with experience in supporting RFPs, service design, pricing strategies, and business growth initiatives
* CISSP, CISM, or equivalent industry\-recognized certifications
* GIAC certifications such as GCIA, GCIH, GMON, or similar
* Relevant cloud and security certifications (e.g., AWS, Azure, GCP security specializations) are an advantage

data.jd_text:
**Our Purpose**
*Mastercard powers economies and empowers people in 200\+ countries and territories worldwide. Together with our customers, we’re helping build a sustainable economy where everyone can prosper. We support a wide range of digital payments choices, making transactions secure, simple, smart and accessible. Our technology and innovation, partnerships and networks combine to deliver a unique set of products and services that help people, businesses and governments realize their greatest potential.*
**Title And Summary**
 Director, Product Management (Pricing \& Assurance)
   

  

 Who is Mastercard?
   

  

 Mastercard is a global technology company in the payments industry. Our mission is to connect and power an inclusive, digital economy that benefits everyone, everywhere by making transactions safe, simple, smart, and accessible. Using secure data and networks, partnerships and passion, our innovations and solutions help individuals, financial institutions, governments, and businesses realize their greatest potential.
   

  

 Our decency quotient, or DQ, drives our culture and everything we do inside and outside of our company. With connections across more than 210 countries and territories, we are building a sustainable world that unlocks priceless possibilities for all.
   

  

**Overview**
 Mastercard’s Transfer Solutions team in EEMEA is driving at scale innovation and growth to meet today’s demands for simple, certain, and secure international and domestic payments by individuals and businesses of all sizes. Mastercard Move is a portfolio of integrated assets and capabilities designed to service key verticals, customer segments and multiple payment flows. Through simple connectivity means, we enable partners the ability to reach a variety of endpoints—account, card, mobile wallet, cards and cash out locations —nearly anywhere in the world.
   

  

 The organization is looking for a Director, Product Management (Pricing \& Assurance), Mastercard Move as part of the EEMEA Product Management Team for Cross Border Payments, to work with customers, who are primarily large Financial Institutions, Fin Techs, Bureau De Changes / Exchange Houses or Government Clearing Schemes to further the strategic and commercial agenda of Mastercard in the region focused on Cross Border Payments, which includes Low Value B2B / Commercial Payments, P2P Remittances and Purpose\-based payments like Bill Payments, Tuition Payments, Utility, Social Security etc.
   

  

 The ideal candidate is aware of the Cross\-Border Payments landscape and is aware of the intricate dynamics of how money moves between Institutions and Borders, being familiar with the role Correspondent and Bilateral Banking arrangements play in the setup, the evolving nature of SWIFT (and its evolution to ISO messaging standards), existing Settlement \& Funding mediums, helping to identify the gaps and solutionize areas where Mastercard’s own and partner led solutions can add value.
   

  

 Role
   

  

* This is a Pricing and Assurance role at its heart where you will work with Product Sales teams / Account Managers to ensure we are able to provide best commercial value to our customers alongside safeguarding long\-term financial interests for the company.
* Often, you would work with customers directly to help them formulate the right value story / financial model to ensure the product is able to provide the best Value Proposition to our clients and their customers.
* Prepare / facilitate complex business cases within Mastercard at a customer / deal / portfolio level to ensure the right investments / financial support / prioritization is done for opportunities worth the merit.
* Own the budgeting and forecasting cycle for the business, and partner with Finance colleagues upstream and Sales colleagues downstream to ensure we can project and hit the business numbers.
* Formulate and track underlying business driver and enabler metrics on weekly / fortnightly / monthly level with cross\-functional teams – including delivery timelines, growth rates etc. as relevant.
* Executive presentation outlining business direction and facilitation of QBR / MBR with senior leaders and often with strategic clients. Partner for strategy refresh cycles to evaluate what’s working v/s not.
* Act as PMO for key internal work\-streams which affects revenue realization – like Network health and breadth, FX constructs, Deal Incentive structures etc.


**All About You**
 The ideal candidate for this position should:
   

  

* Understands cross\-border payments at its’ core and the lever(s) that influence the commercial health of the product and the business at large.
* Understanding of financial and reporting principles of key metrices that influence business development.
* Be able to work horizontally in a highly matrixed organization with overlapping ownership and influence. Be able to get the work done through influence, reasoning rather than authority.
* Very strong with Excel and PowerPoint as that would effectively be 70% of your work – pricing, governance, reporting.
* Strong communicator and have the temperament to be able to lead client facing conversations independently.
* If you have done a pricing role in the past in the industry – it’s a plus. Product FP\&A candidates may also be fit with extension.


**Corporate Security Responsibility**
 All activities involving access to Mastercard assets, information, and networks comes with an inherent risk to the organization and, therefore, it is expected that every person working for, or on behalf of, Mastercard is responsible for information security and must:
   

  

* Abide by Mastercard’s security policies and practices;
* Ensure the confidentiality and integrity of the information being accessed;
* Report any suspected information security violation or breach, and
* Complete all periodic mandatory security trainings in accordance with Mastercard’s guidelines.

**Chief Operations Officer** 




 Our client is a local business group and is seeking to recruit a Chief Operations Officer, blending the internal financial discipline of a CFO with the external capital deployment of an Investment Director to drive aggressive, sustainable growth. It is a dual\-focus executive position responsible for both the operational efficiency of the business and the strategic performance of its proprietary investment portfolio.

* **Strategic Growth \& Value Creation:** 
 Leads the company in financial maturity, performance, and value creation by aligning financial strategy with long\-term corporate goals.
* **Fiscal Stewardship:** 
 Manages capital structure and ensures "value for money" utilization, promoting sound decision\-making across all stakeholders.
* **Daily Operations Impact:** 
 Oversees daily operational efficiency to drive sustainable profitability and mitigate high\-level risks.



  





**2\. Investment \& Portfolio Management (Investment Director Focus)** 



* **Investment Strategy Execution:** 
 Defines and executes the family office’s investment strategy in alignment with the Investment Committee’s mandate and long\-term objectives.
* **Active Portfolio Optimization:** 
 Leads asset allocation across global equities, fixed income, structured products, and alternative assets, conducting dynamic rebalancing to optimize performance based on market conditions.
* **Proprietary Fund Management:** 
 Ensures disciplined capital deployment and manages the proprietary funds to support the organization's growth.



  





**Candidate Requirements:**



* Proven P\&L leadership, ideally within the real estate sector, with deep expertise in asset management and portfolio optimization.
* Strong track record of disciplined capital allocation and investment across a broad range of asset classes, including public and private equity, structured products, funds, and fixed income.

data.jd_text:
**About The Role**
**Who are we**
 At Balio Software we acquire and scale niche B2B software companies worldwide, bridging the gap between traditional software stability and AI innovation. Our team consists of successful SaaS founders and investors who have accelerated companies into high\-performing businesses. Today, we are driving systemic change across our portfolio by deploying an AI\-first mindset. By integrating advanced AI solutions into the companies we purchase, we elevate market value and sharpen value propositions, enabling businesses to excel as agile, efficient, and modern organisations. We are operators at our core, powered by the future of intelligence.
   

  

**The role**
 Balio is hiring a Head of Portfolio Engineering to set the technical direction for our portfolio of acquired software businesses and build the engineering function that will scale with us. This is a hands\-on leadership role that sits at group level; working across every product and team in our portfolio, you'll raise the quality bar, consolidate infrastructure, and give our engineering teams the tools and standards to build AI\-native by default. This is a fully remote role and you will work with teams across multiple time zones (AEST to PST).
   

  

**What You'll Own**
* Engineering leadership across all portfolio companies, setting the technical direction, quality bar, and operating cadence.
* Hiring, developing, and holding accountable engineering leads at each portfolio company; building a bench of talent across the group.
* Driving an AI\-first engineering approach, identifying where AI tooling, automation, and agents can accelerate product delivery and reduce manual overhead.
* Partnering with portfolio company GMs to translate business goals into technical roadmaps.
* Serving as the primary escalation point for engineering risk, architecture decisions, and major technical investments across the portfolio.
* Running a lightweight shared services function where applicable \- identifying where tooling, infrastructure, or practices can be standardised across companies.
* Reporting directly to the Head of Portfolio you will serve as the technical lead within the Balio leadership team.


**Who You Are**
* A senior engineering leader \- you've run engineering teams of 15\+ people and know what good looks like across the full SDLC. Strong preference for experience managing across multiple teams.
* Broadly technically credible \- across SDLC, architecture, infrastructure, and delivery, with strong mentorship and decision\-support capability.
* Operationally sharp \- comfortable managing across multiple products/companies simultaneously, with strong prioritisation instincts.
* An AI native \- you use AI tools daily, you think about how to embed them in engineering workflows, and you hold a genuine conviction that AI changes how software gets built. The focus is practical productivity gains, not buzzword\-led initiatives.
* A strong communicator \- able to translate technical complexity for commercial stakeholders and vice versa.
* Comfortable with ambiguity \- this role is being built; the right person will shape it.


**Background we'd expect**
* 10\+ years in software engineering, with 4\+ years in an engineering leadership role (VP Eng, Head of Engineering, or equivalent).
* Experience in a multi\-product or portfolio environment preferred (PE\-backed, holding company, or venture studio).
* Track record of improving engineering velocity and quality in acquired or turnaround businesses.
* Experience shipping measurable quality or productivity gains using AI assisted workflows


 By submitting this application, I agree that my personal data will be collected, processed, and retained by the company solely for the purposes of managing and assessing my candidacy.

Our portfolio includes products and solutions for baggage and cargo handling, high\-end software for the digitalization of logistics processes as well as an extensive range of maintenance and services. Major customers include renowned airports and airlines around the globe.
   

  

**About The Role**
 Are you energized by partnering with senior leaders to enable business success through people\-focused solutions? As Head of HR, you will work closely with leaders and their leadership teams across the Middle East with focus on UAE and Saudi\-Arabia to support the delivery of the people agenda.
   

  

 In this role, you will act as a trusted HR advisor on a broad range of people and organizational topics, helping leaders translate business priorities into effective people actions and play an important role in supporting leadership teams through change, organizational development, talent decisions, and workforce planning.
   

  

 This role combines senior HR partnering with hands\-on execution of (a.o.) HR cycle topics.
   

  

**What are my job responsibilities?**
**Strategic HR Leadership \& People Advisory**
* Act as a strategic advisor to Executive Management on all HR and workforce\-related matters
* Partner with leaders to design organizations that effectively support both operational and office\-based teams
* Translate business priorities into practical people\-centered actions that resonate across all workforce segments
* Lead employee relations initiatives, including dispute resolution and organizational interventions


**Workforce Planning, Talent \& Employee Lifecycle**
* Lead workforce planning aligned with business growth and operational realities
* Oversee recruitment, onboarding, and employee lifecycle processes
* Partner with leadership on hiring strategies, workforce structures, and succession planning
* Ensure smooth onboarding and integration, especially for expatriate and site\-based employees
* Ensure attraction, development, and retention of talent while maintaining workforce stability


**Employee Relations, Labour Law \& Compliance**
* Manage employee relations and labor matters in line with UAE \& KSA labor laws
* Act as a key point of contact for complex employee relations matters, with strong on\-the\-ground involvement
* Build trust with blue\-collar employees through visibility, accessibility, and consistent communication
* Support leaders in resolving employee issues, conflicts, and workplace challenges
* Ensure fair, consistent, and legally compliant HR practices
* Develop and implement HR policies and conduct audits to ensure governance and continuous improvement


**Performance, Development \& Engagement**
* Implement performance management practices aligned with business goals
* Support leaders in driving performance through effective people management
* Drive career development, succession planning, and talent initiatives
* Foster a high\-performance culture while ensuring employee engagement and sustainable workloads


**Compensation, Benefits \& Employee Value Proposition**
* Design and manage competitive compensation and benefits structures
* Lead salary benchmarking, job evaluations, and incentive programs
* Enhance benefits and offerings to meet both organizational and employee needs


**HR Operations, Systems \& Employee Experience**
* Oversee HR operations including HRIS, payroll coordination, and employee records
* Ensure smooth delivery of employee services (facilities, travel, housing, etc.)
* Manage HR systems, reporting, and workforce analytics
* Drive efficient processes while maintaining a positive employee experience


**HR Transformation, Projects \& Change Management**
* Lead HR transformation and digitalization initiatives
* Manage HR projects end\-to\-end, ensuring delivery and impact
* Drive change management with strong focus on communication, adoption, and employee impact
* Ensure change initiatives are clearly communicated and understood by all workforce segments, including non\-office employees
* Define and track KPIs to measure both business and people outcomes


**What do I need to qualify for this role?**
* Strong experience in an HR Business Partner or HR leadership role, preferably in a global or matrixed organization
* Experience partnering with senior leaders on people, workforce, and organizational topics
* Experience managing large blue\-collar or operational workforce populations
* Proven experience in employee relations, labor law, and workforce management
* Experience supporting organizational change and leadership decision\-making
* A collaborative style and confidence working across all levels


**Qualifications \& Experience**
* Bachelor’s degree in human resources, Business Administration, or related field (master’s preferred)
* 12–15 years of HR experience, including 5\+ years in a leadership role within UAE \& KSA
* Strong knowledge of UAE \& KSA Labor Law
* Experience in HR transformation and project management


**Skills \& Competencies**
* Strategic thinking and business acumen
* Leadership and stakeholder management
* Change management and transformation expertise
* Communication and influencing skills
* Strong business understanding and the ability to translate business priorities into people actions
* Analytical and problem\-solving abilities an end\-to\-end experience which anchors improved performance
* A pragmatic, resilient, and solutions\-oriented mindset
* The ability to work effectively in a dynamic and fast\-changing environment


**About The Team**
 You will report to Global HR BP ICS of VL and work closely with the regional VL and VI HR colleagues, and HR Functions and HR Service team.

 • Turn complex Further Maths topics into clear, engaging, exam\-ready teaching

 • Create high\-quality worked solutions, model methods, revision resources, and exam\-focused walkthroughs
 



 • Ensure students understand how to approach unfamiliar problems, structure solutions clearly, and secure method marks efficiently
 



 • Design lesson sequences that build understanding in the right order and improve student results

data.jd_text:
Head of Global Marketing (Brand \& B2B Demand Generation)
   

  

 Reports to: CEO
   

  

 Team Size: \~6 Members (Mix of full\-time/part\-time: Content writers, copywriters, designers, videographers, performance marketer). Working in Dubai office and remote.
   

  

 Role Overview
   

  

 We are a global Immersive Aerial Experience Studio transitioning from a drone\-light\-show startup to a premium, multi\-technology entertainment company. We operate across the Middle East, Europe, and the Americas, selling highly customized, six\-figure ($50k \- $100k\+) shows to corporate entities, governments, and mega\-event organizers.
   

  

 We are seeking a "Brand \& Growth Hybrid" to lead our global marketing. You must possess the creative "eye" to maintain our premium, luxury aesthetic across visual channels (like Instagram), while possessing the analytical "math" to build a rigorous B2B demand\-generation funnel. You will direct an existing 6\-person creative and performance team, shifting their output from "B2C awareness" to targeted, revenue\-generating B2B campaigns.
   

  

 Core Responsibilities
   

  

 The "Luxury Storefront" (Brand Validation \& Creative Direction)
   

  

* Creative Quality Control: Act as the "Brand Guardian." Direct our videographers and designers to ensure every Instagram Reel, YouTube video, and pitch deck feels like a luxury service that justifies a $50,000 \- $100,000\+ price tag
* The Visual Portfolio: Strategically own our Instagram and visual platforms. Ensure they serve as the ultimate, high\-end portfolio that instantly validates our credibility when a VIP client looks us up after a sales pitch
* Global Localization: Adapt our visual and written brand for different cultural touchpoints, seamlessly managing localized campaigns for Dubai, Brazil, and Europe in multiple languages


 The "VIP Sales Engine" (B2B Demand Generation \& ToFu Steering)
   

  

* Sales Alignment: Work directly with the CEO and (regional) Sales Director to define Ideal Customer Profiles (ICPs). Transform the marketing department into a Top\-of\-Funnel (ToFu) machine that feeds the sales team
* Targeted Campaign Execution: Oversee the performance marketer to run highly targeted Meta and Google ad campaigns aimed specifically at B2B decision\-makers (Event Directors, PR Agencies, Government Tourism Boards)
* Metrics \& ROI: Shift to Marketing Qualified Leads (MQLs), Cost Per Acquisition (CPA), and overall pipeline revenue generated
* Market Intelligence \& Expansion: Identify new markets, analyze customer segments, and monitor competitors to support strategic expansion and strengthen Cyberdrone’s global market position


 Executive Thought Leadership, PR, \& Events
   

  

* Personal Branding: Manage the LinkedIn presence and personal branding of the CEO and key Sales Team members, positioning them as international thought leaders in immersive entertainment technology
* High\-Value B2B Channels: Pivot focus toward channels that close enterprise deals: secure speaking slots at major industry panels, negotiate PR placements in event\-industry trade magazines, and strategize direct\-mail/face\-to\-face VIP events and exhibition presence
* Strategic Partnerships \& Sponsorships: Develop and manage strategic partnerships, sponsorships, and collaborations that enhance brand exposure, credibility, and access to new markets and audiences


**Technical Requirements \& Skills**
* The "Dual\-Brain" Marketer: Must demonstrate both high\-end creative taste (video/design direction) and rigorous analytical skills (CRM data, ROI calculation, ad\-spend optimization)
* B2B / Enterprise Experience: Proven track record of marketing high\-ticket services or products. You know how to market to a corporate Board or a major event agency
* Team Leadership: Experience managing and extracting the best work from creative specialists (videographers, designers, writers)
* Multichannel Fluency: Deep understanding of how to take one core piece of content (e.g., a drone show recap video) and adapt it for Instagram (brand), LinkedIn (lead gen), and PR (authority)


 Requirements:
   

  

* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Marketing, Business, or a related field
* 7–10 years of marketing experience, including a senior or leadership role
* Proven experience in B2B marketing and demand generation, preferably for high\-value services or technology
* Strong track record in brand development combined with revenue\-driven marketing
* Experience working closely with sales teams and managing enterprise sales funnels
* Demonstrated experience leading and developing a marketing team
* Analytical mindset with experience using data and KPIs to guide strategy
* Fluent in English; additional languages are a plus


 Employment conditions:
   

  

* Visa and health insurance (if employed in Dubai)
* Competitive salary (includes housing\- and commute allowance)
* Annual flight ticket to home country
* 24 days of vacation leave (excluding public holidays)
* Fulltime (40 hours/week)

data.jd_text:
The Insurance Business Development Director is responsible for driving the growth and strategic expansion of Estithmar Capital’s insurance portfolio. This role focuses on identifying investment opportunities, building strategic partnerships, and developing innovative insurance solutions across traditional and digital channels.
 



 The position plays a critical role in aligning insurance initiatives with the firm’s broader investment strategy, ensuring sustainable growth, profitability, and market positioning across regional and international markets.
 



**Key Responsibilities** 




**1\. Portfolio Management** 



* Oversee and manage the firm’s insurance investments, partnerships, and ventures.
* Monitor financial and operational performance of insurance\-related assets.
* Develop and execute strategies to enhance portfolio value, profitability, and scalability.
* Prepare performance reports and insights for senior management and shareholders.



**2\. Business Development \& Investments** 



* Identify and evaluate new opportunities across:
* Insurance companies
* Insurtech platforms
* Brokerage firms
* Strategic distribution partnerships
* Lead end\-to\-end deal execution including sourcing, structuring, negotiation, and closing.
* Develop new revenue streams and scalable insurance business models.



**3\. Strategic Partnerships** 



* Build and manage relationships with:
* Insurance and reinsurance companies
* Brokers and intermediaries
* Financial institutions and banks
* Structure and negotiate distribution agreements, joint ventures, and alliances.
* Represent Estithmar Capital in key industry engagements and forums.



**4\. Market \& Industry Analysis** 



* Conduct in\-depth research on regional and global insurance markets.
* Identify emerging trends and opportunities such as:
* Digital insurance / Insurtech
* Bancassurance
* Embedded insurance
* Health and life insurance segments
* Provide strategic insights to support investment decisions.



**5\. Product Development \& Distribution** 



* Collaborate with partners to design and launch innovative insurance products.
* Develop multi\-channel distribution strategies including:
* Corporate partnerships
* Digital platforms
* Financial services ecosystems
* Drive go\-to\-market strategies for new insurance offerings.



**6\. Regulatory \& Compliance Coordination** 



* Ensure all insurance\-related activities comply with applicable regulatory frameworks.
* Liaise with regulatory bodies and supervisory authorities where required.
* Monitor regulatory developments impacting insurance and financial services sectors.



**7\. Financial \& Investment Analysis** 



* Conduct financial modeling, valuation, and due diligence for insurance investments.
* Assess profitability, capital requirements, and associated risks.
* Support investment committees with data\-driven recommendations and insights.



**Qualifications \& Experience** 



* Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Economics, Business Administration, or related field (Master’s preferred).
* Minimum
 **12–15 years of experience** 
 in insurance, financial services, or investment management.
* Strong exposure to:
* Insurance business development
* Investment structuring and partnerships
* Insurtech / digital insurance ecosystems
* Experience within
 **investment firms, insurance groups, or financial institutions** 
 is highly preferred.
* Regional (GCC) market experience is an advantage.



**Core Competencies** 



* Strong commercial and investment acumen
* Strategic thinking with execution capability
* Advanced financial modeling and analytical skills
* High\-level negotiation and stakeholder management
* Deep understanding of insurance value chains and distribution models
* Ability to operate in a fast\-paced, multi\-asset investment environment



**Regulatory Considerations** 



* May require regulatory approval depending on the scope of insurance and investment activities.
* Must ensure compliance with applicable financial services and insurance regulations.

data.jd_text:
**Our business landscape** 




  





 We’re an award\-winning global communications company operating in nine countries across the Middle East, North Africa, and Southeast Asia. Our strategy is to become the region’s leading digital infrastructure provider. Ooredoo Group’s strategic vision is guided by five key pillars:
 



  




* **Value\-Focused Portfolio:** 
 Boosting asset returns by focusing on telco operations, towers, data centres, the sea cable business and fintech.



  




* **Strengthen the Core:** 
 Optimally using deployed capital and maintain an appropriate cost structure.



  




* **Evolve the Core:** 
 Monetising opportunities to generate new revenue streams via programmes focusing on analytics, digitalisation of operations, and partnerships with digital service providers.



  




* **People:** 
 Building an engaged and empowered workforce through integrated learning programs and coaching and mentoring.



  




* **Excellence in Customer Experience:** 
 Creating superior customer experiences.



  





 From day one, every employee who joins our team becomes an integral part of our success journey. We offer you the chance to enhance your skills, advance your career, and maintain a healthy work\-life balance. Empowering you to catapult your personal and professional growth. If you’re looking to challenge your growth potential, Ooredoo is the employer for you.
 



  





**Job overview** 




  




* The Director, Strategic projects is responsible for leading the planning, execution, and governance of the strategy’s most critical cross\-functional initiatives
* This role ensures that high\-impact projects are delivered on time, within scope, and in alignment with the
* Group’s strategic and financial objectives. The position combines leadership in corporate development, strategic execution, and stakeholder management across business units, regions, and external partners
* The role ensures end\-to\-end ownership of strategic projects, from origination to execution and value realization, aligning with the Group’s growth, digital transformation, and shareholder objectives.
* The role together with the team member reporting to the role holder will oversee a wide range of projects and programs.
* One of the initial focus will be the key strategic initiative related to the expansions in scope, and territories of Ooredoo’s push into Data Centers as well AI? GPU as a service.
* While Syntys team is responsible for the day\-to\-day operation of these assets, the role holder will drive the expansion into new territories which is a key part of the strategy
* It will also include new strategic projects as approved as part of the updated strategy.



  





 The role holder acts not only as a PMO or project manager but as the project owner, driving the actual content and delivery of the project and providing content expertise in the relevant field.
 



  





**Your impact on our goals** 




  





**Strategic Program Leadership** 



* Lead the planning, structuring, and delivery of complex, multi\-stakeholder projects, including joint ventures, market entries, and major transformations.
* Define strategic objectives, milestones, and performance indicators in coordination with the
* Establish project governance frameworks, steering committees, and reporting standards.
* Drive decision\-making through data\-driven insights, structured analysis, and scenario planning.



  





**Provide direct support to the CEO and Board during major transaction and strategic processes** 
 .
 



  





**Drive the portfolio of strategic projects, partnerships JV and transactions related to Data Center, Ai infrastructure and GPU as a service and AI infrastructure including** 



* Drive expansion in this area in particular expansion outside Ooredoo Group and its affiliates current footprint
* Drive the design, execution and implementation of relevant strategic initiatives related to this area.
* Negotiate strategic agreements and partnerships



  





**Cross\-Functional Program Management** 



* Coordinate workstreams across Finance, Legal, HR, Operations, IT, and Business Units.
* Identify interdependencies, risks, and bottlenecks, and implement mitigation strategies.
* Manage cross\-border teams, consultants, and advisors to deliver outcomes efficiently.
* Ensure alignment of initiatives with budget, resource allocation, and strategic KPIs.
* Coordinate engagement across all operating companies



**Executive \& Communication Board** 



* Prepare executive\-level presentations, Board papers, and investor communications related to strategic projects.
* Translate complex analyses into clear recommendations and progress updates.
* Lead stakeholder management with theCEO and Group Strategy in stakeholder engagement with shareholders, regulators, and partners.



**Team Leadership \& Capability Building** 



* Lead and mentor project managers and analysts
* Foster a culture of accountability, analytical excellence, and collaboration.
* Institutionalize best practices in project management and performance tracking.



  





**Experience and Qualifications** 




  




* Prior experience of transformation and transaction planning and execution within Ooredoo
* Experience driving large scale transformation projects
* Experience at a Senior Level in a telecom operator in strategy or M\&A team at a senior level (CXO or CX\-1\)
* 15 / 20 years of experience preferable in the Telco industry (not just technical)
* Knowledge and prior experience relating to DC and AI
* Experience in managing large scale transformation projects
* Experience in managing top management escalations and creating buy\-in with stakeholders
* Multi disciplinary cross border program management
* Finance – business planning, valuation, accounting, tax, budgeting, AOP impact assessment, accounting separation
* Employee transfer requirements
* Organisation planning
* Scope specification for transaction advisors
* Contract drafting and negotiation
* Corporate Governance
* Transitional services arrangements
* Bachelor or Master degree – finance or business preferred

KEO is a creative enterprise, where innovation is a way of life. We are uniquely resourced with end\-to\-end services to take clients from inspiration – through conceptualization – to realization of planning, design or project delivery in the built and natural environments. For over 60 years we’ve led with vision, contributing to many of the world’s most ambitious projects, iconic places, remarkable experiences and prosperous communities.
 



  





 As a highly integrated and agile AEP/PMCM firm, KEO is recognized by ENR as one of the Top 225 International Design Firms and one of the Top 20 International PM/CM Firms. We are also ranked by World Architecture as the 51st largest global architecture firm and the \#1 Firm in the Middle East Region in their 2024 WA100 Survey.
 



  





 We invite you to join us. Why?
 



  





 When you join KEO, you’ll discover more than just a job – you’ll find a supportive environment that fosters your professional development through internal global mobility and career development and does so within a culture that supports company\-wide health and well\-being through on\-demand counselling services and regular workplace clinics. You will be invited to celebrate community events such as sports days, fun\-runs, in\-house sports teams and beach clean ups. In addition to your competitive package and benefits you will have access to a suite of policies that include hybrid working arrangements, individual athletic sponsorship, study assistance sponsorship, employee referral rewards.
 



  





 Our newest opportunity is for a talented
 **Director \- Project Controls** 
 to join our PMCM Division based in
 **Dubai OR Abu Dhabi, UAE** 
 . This position is responsible for establishing, managing and continuously improving KEO's project controls framework across GCC\-based projects. This core\-office position ensures the effective planning, scheduling, resourcing, progress monitoring, reporting, and document control of multi\-disciplinary consultancy projects.
 



  





 The role provides strategic oversight and governance to ensure that projects are delivered on time, within approved schedules, and in alignment with contractual, corporate, and client requirements. The Director will act as a trusted advisor to project directors and senior leadership, supporting informed decision\-making through accurate data, forecasting, and performance analysis.
 



  





 We envisage success in this role to include;
 



  




* Establish and maintain corporate standards, procedures, and best practices for project planning and scheduling across all projects.
* Provide strategic oversight of project baseline schedules, ensuring alignment with contracts, scopes, and milestones.
* Review, validate, and approve project schedules, recovery plans, and revised programs.
* Ensure integration of schedules across disciplines, phases, and stakeholders.
* Monitor schedule performance, identify critical path risks, and drive mitigation strategies in collaboration with project teams.
* Oversee project performance measurement systems, including progress tracking, earned value management, and KPI reporting.
* Ensure timely and accurate preparation of executive dashboards, monthly reports, and schedule risk assessments.
* Analyze trends, variances, and forecast impacts on project timelines and advise leadership on corrective actions.
* Support senior management with data\-driven insights for strategic planning and decision\-making.
* Lead the development and management of resource planning and forecasting across all projects in GCC.
* Ensure optimal allocation of personnel in line with project requirements, skills, availability, and workload.
* Work closely with HR, Operations, and Project Directors to address resource gaps, mobilization planning, and recruitment forecasting.
* Monitor utilization rates and proactively manage capacity planning to support business objectives.
* Support succession planning and development of project controls talent within the organization.



  





 To be successful in this dynamic opportunity, we envision that your career journey to date will include minimum 15 years work experience partnered with a Bachelor's Degree in Engineering, Constructuon Management , Project Management or related discipline.
 



  





 Chartered status or Professional Membership will be viewed favourably.
 



  





 KEO’s performance is founded upon integrity, results, innovation, safety and our people. We embrace diversity and recognise its’ contribution to client success wherever we work.
 



 We are excited to hear how you can partner with our award\-winning team and treat all expressions of interest confidentially.

* Deep understanding of mobile platform limitations and how to work within them

 You can choose various work types: hybrid or office. Also we have flexible hours with the option of taking days off.

 Employment

data.jd_text:
Sulzer is a leading engineering company with a proud heritage of innovation. Join our global team to grow your expertise and develop innovative solutions that enable a prosperous and more sustainable society.
   

  

**About The Role**
 Job Summary
   

  

 The Head of Procurement is responsible for ensuring efficient and reliable supply of materials to support optimal production processes. The role is accountable for on\-time material availability, fulfillment of quality requirements, delivery performance (OTD), and cost optimization. This position works closely with Regional Procurement, Category Managers, and the local management team to ensure alignment between procurement activities and business objectives.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Responsibility for the procurement activities of all direct materials and defined indirect materials in SSPC
* Management of the local team of operational and category buyers
* Alignment and challenging of commodity strategies with category managers and the Management Team
* Support the coordination of procurement optimization activities across EMEA
* Support purchasers in the optimization of procurement costs
* Procurement controlling for SSPC
* Support supplier management
* Proactively engage and support company initiatives designed to promote a culture of safe working, environmental protection and continual improvement.
* Remain accountable for the health, safety and welfare of their departmental workforce.
* Ensure compliance to systems and procedures developed for the health and safety of the workforce and environmental protection
* Ensure that Safe Systems of Work are developed and implemented for all activities, through risk assessment and operating procedures
* Visibly lead EH\&S improvement through observation, intervention and workplace tours.


**Qualifications / Requirements**
* Technical or commercial university degree
* Significant experience of working in an international matrix organization this could limit your choices too much
* Significant management experience in the procurement of an engineering company
* Proven skills in supply chain management, supplier development,
* Excellent leadership, management and technical skills
* Strong negotiation skills
* Analytical skills and structured work
* Excellent communication skills, motivation and a high level of personal responsibility
* Managing and motivating teams and internal and external stakeholders
* Being able to work within a matrix organization
* Drive for results
* Direct and indirect leadership skills
* Ensuring accountability and integrity
* High level of loyalty to the company
* Strategic agility and global mindset
* Decision making within a complex environment, taking care about local and EMEA targets
* Functional / Technical competency
* Interpersonal skills
* Good MS Office skills and knowledge of relevant IT solutions, in particular SAP (MM)


 What we offer you
   

  

* Excellent opportunities for development, along with a competitive salary and company bonus scheme.
* A great working environment.
* Work Location: Riyadh\- Industrial Area 2


 Sulzer is an equal opportunity employer. We believe in the strength of a diverse workforce and are committed to offering an inclusive work environment.
   

  

 We are proud to be recognized as a Top Employer 2026 in Brazil, Canada, China, Finland, Germany, Ireland, Mexico, Switzerland, South Africa, the UK and the USA.

**ob Title:** 
 Director of Marketing
   

  

**Location:** 
 Riyadh, Saudi Arabia
   

  

**Industry:** 
 Logistics \& Courier Services
   

  

**Employment Type:** 
 Full\-Time \| Permanent
   

  

**Experience:** 
 6\-10 Years
   

  

**Nationality:** 
 Saudi National Preferred
   

  

**THE OPPORTUNITY**
 UltimatePeaks is retained by one of Saudi Arabia's largest and most established logistics and courier groups — a market leader with a nationwide footprint spanning hundreds of service centers and operations extending across the GCC and beyond.
   

  

 The group is entering an accelerated growth phase and is seeking a Director of Marketing to lead its brand transformation and digital marketing agenda. This is a high\-impact role at the center of the company's ambition to evolve from a logistics operator into a recognizable, digitally\-native consumer brand — one that resonates with the next generation of Saudi customers.
   

  

**AT A GLANCE**
* Reports To: Head of Commercial
* Location: Riyadh, Saudi Arabia
* Industry: Logistics \& Courier Services
* Nationality: Saudi National Preferred
* Employment: Full\-Time \| Permanent
* Experience: 6\-10 Years


**WHY THIS ROLE STANDS OUT**
**Market leader.** 
 Join Saudi Arabia's most recognized name in courier and last\-mile delivery.
   

  

**Real transformation.** 
 This is not a maintenance role — you will build and own the brand identity for a company in active growth mode.
   

  

**Digital\-first mandate.** 
 The organization is fully committed to becoming a digital\-native brand. Snapchat, TikTok, Instagram — this is your canvas.
   

  

**Strategic access.** 
 Direct line to commercial leadership with full budget authority and agency management responsibility.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
**Brand Strategy \& Transformation**
* Define and execute a bold brand repositioning strategy that modernizes the company's identity across all touchpoints
* Develop a unified visual language applicable to digital, physical, fleet, and service center environments
* Own brand health metrics — awareness, sentiment, NPS — and drive continuous improvement


**Digital Marketing \& Social Media**
* Lead the social media strategy across Snapchat, Instagram, TikTok, X, and LinkedIn with Snapchat as the primary growth channel
* Build an always\-on Arabic\-first content engine that speaks authentically to Saudi consumers
* Drive influencer and creator partnerships, performance marketing, and app acquisition campaigns


**Commercial Marketing \& Campaigns**
* Design integrated campaigns aligned to revenue targets — B2C, B2B, and e\-commerce merchant segments
* Lead high\-impact seasonal activations: Ramadan, National Day, 11\.11, and more
* Own marketing attribution and KPI reporting with full commercial accountability


**Team \& Agency Leadership**
* Build and lead an internal marketing team spanning creative, digital, and content
* Manage agency relationships across creative, media, PR, and production
* Establish marketing operations discipline — budget, process, and reporting cadence


**Requirements**
**WHO YOU ARE**
 We are looking for a young, ambitious Saudi marketer — someone who does not just understand digital, but lives it. You grew up on Snapchat. You know what makes content travel in the Saudi feed. You have built brands, not just managed them.
   

  

* Experience: 6\-10 years in marketing with a strong digital and brand focus
* Digital Fluency: Native command of Snapchat, TikTok, Meta, and Google Ads ecosystems
* Brand Building: Proven track record leading brand transformation or major rebranding
* Market Knowledge: Deep understanding of Saudi consumer culture and social media behavior
* Languages: Arabic (native) and English (professional)
* Education: Bachelor's in Marketing, Communications, Business, or equivalent
* Highly Valued:
+ Strong familiarity with Saudi digital ecosystems and content dynamics
+ Experience operating in high\-growth, consumer\-facing environments
+ Ability to build culturally relevant campaigns that resonate locally


****Leadership Expectations****
* Operates with strong ownership and accountability
* Brings both commercial thinking and cultural intuition
* Able to move fast, challenge assumptions, and deliver measurable outcomes
* Builds brands that earn attention through relevance, not just spend


****Confidentiality****
 This search is conducted on a strictly confidential basis.
   

  

 Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
   

  

**Benefits**
* High\-impact role with direct visibility to senior leadership
* Opportunity to lead a large\-scale brand transformation in Saudi Arabia
* Shape a marketing function with real commercial responsibility

* Head – IT Ops Governance and Control will streamline and harmonize all processes and control measures across the technology landscape, ensure alignment with overarching business objectives, promote a cohesive approach across units with IT to ensure tight control, yet allow for agile delivery, in the most effective and efficient manner.
* The role will ensure prioritization of tasks, compliance to standards and policies, define and disseminate service level agreements within Business Units at each entity and across entities for shared services and uniformity of process, procedures, and control measures.

* The role will closely work with Finance, Strategy, and PMO to ensure alignment and reporting consistency and information updates.



  





**Objectives:** 




  




* Functional Governance Framework which is aligned with the Group.
* Documented Service Level Agreements (SLAs) with Business Units, subsidiaries and Group.
* Functional Organization Structure with clear segregation of duties and no single points of failure
* Published Governance Processes and Procedures in alignment with the Organizational policies and industry best practices.
* Annual Technology Budgets (CAPEX and OPEX).
* Published “Key Performance Indicators”



  





**Responsibilities:** 




  




* Implement local control in line with group polices.
* Ensure license compliance in line with group enterprise agreement. Share license utilization with Group
* Coordinate and support the group in tracking the group and local SLA’s and provide periodical reports for adherence and non\-compliance.
* Keep the Group updated on major incidents faced at the subsidiary level and impacts the Technology services.
* Establish the Governance Framework and align with the Group establishing local controls (like CAB) in line with Group policies
* Establish the Service Level Agreements (SLAs) with Business Units, subsidiaries and Group. Once agreed and established, ensure regular monitoring and adjustments are done to optimize the services and SLAs
* Functional Organization Structure with clear segregation of duties and no single points of failure.
* Published Governance Processes and Procedures in alignment with the Organizational policies and industry best practices.
* Annual Technology Budgets (CAPEX and OPEX).
* Published “Key Performance Indicators”.

* A bachelor’s degree in information technology, Computer Science, or a related field.
